input.headline: Manchester derby live on Sky in January as fixtures released up to February 2

raw.headline: Manchester derby live on Sky in January as fixtures released up to February 2

winner: In Manchester, it's reported that Sky will broadcast the derby on January 31st at exactly 2:00 pm... and on February 2nd as well, just to make sure no one misses a second of this riveting repeat.

candidates.text: Why was Manchester United's calendar so popular in January? Because it promised a live date with Sky during the derby!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat specific and ties the headline elements together, but the pun on 'date' feels a bit forced and lacks natural flow."}

candidates.text: Well, at least they're giving us a heads-up about the next Manchester derby... in January of next year.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is timely and specific, playing on the delayed release of the derby date. It's slightly generic but still hits with a mild surprise."}

candidates.text: In Manchester, it's reported that Sky will broadcast the derby on January 31st at exactly 2:00 pm... and on February 2nd as well, just to make sure no one misses a second of this riveting repeat.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on the repeat broadcast, specific details align with headline, concise and funny"}

candidates.text: Why did Manchester's derby take a break in January? Because it needed a little Sky time-out before resuming on February 2!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the pun on 'Sky time-out,' but it's a bit forced and lacks the sharpness of a truly surprising or specific punchline."}

candidates.text: The footballs are taking a break in January, as Sky prepares to air the talk show, "Manchester Derby Live with Pep and Sol.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the pun on 'Manchester Derby Live' as a talk show, but it's a bit forced and lacks clear specificity to the actual event mentioned in the headline."}
